popularStory.headline: Philippe V le Long (1293-1322)
popularStory.description: Philippe V de France, dit « Philippe le Long » en raison de sa grande taille, né vers 1292/1293, mort le 3 janvier 1322 à Longchamp (Paris), est régent de France (juin-décembre 1316) puis roi de Franc …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippe VI de Valois Roi de France於1293年11月17日出生在法國瑟-吉馬內豐泰布利奧時，他的父親Charles de Valois comte de Valois23歲，母親Marguerite d'Anjou21歲。他於1313年7月13日與Jeanne de Bourgogne Reine de France在法國瑟-吉馬內豐泰布利奧結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1350年8月22日在法國艾-吉洛易享年56歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯沙吉登尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippe VI de Valois Roi de France于1293年11月17日出生在法国瑟-吉馬內豐泰布利奧时，他的父亲Charles de Valois comte de Valois23岁，母亲Marguerite d'Anjou21岁。他于1313年7月13日与Jeanne de Bourgogne Reine de France在法国瑟-吉馬內豐泰布利奧结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1350年8月22日在法国艾-吉洛易享年56岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯沙吉登尼斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Valois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Henri, Normand, Alcide, Armand, Emilien, Gilberte, Gilles, Herve, Jacques, Lucien.
habitational name from (Le) Valois, the name of a few places in France, e.g. in Forez and Limousin.

nameMeanings.name: Philippe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Philip
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Philippe VI de Valois Roi de France was born on 17 November 1293, in Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, France, his father, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, was 23 and his mother, Marguerite d'Anjou, was 21. He married Jeanne de Bourgogne Reine de France on 13 July 1313, in Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 22 August 1350, in Eure-et-Loir, France, at the age of 56, and was buried in Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippe VI de Valois Roi de France est né le 17 novembre 1293, à Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, France, son père, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Marguerite d'Anjou, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Bourgogne Reine de France le 13 juillet 1313, à Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 22 août 1350, à Eure-et-Loir, France, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippe VI de Valois Roi de France am 17. November 1293 in Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Charles de Valois comte de Valois 23 und seine Mutter Marguerite d'Anjou 21. Er hat am 13. Juli 1313 in Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich Jeanne de Bourgogne Reine de France geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 22. August 1350 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Eure-et-Loir, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippe VI de Valois Roi de France è nato il il 17 novembre 1293 nel Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, il suo padre, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite d'Anjou, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Bourgogne Reine de France il 13 luglio 1313, nel Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 agosto 1350, nel Eure-et-Loir, Francia, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippe VI de Valois Roi de Franceが1293年11月17日にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンフォンティアイネブレアウで生まれた時，父Charles de Valois comte de Valoisは23歳，母Marguerite d'Anjouは21歳であった。1313年7月13日にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンフォンティアイネブレアウでJeanne de Bourgogne Reine de Franceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1350年8月22日にフランスエウレ-エト-ロイルで56歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-サイント-デニスサイント-デニスにて埋葬された。

ko.Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Franc: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 일 먼스
ko.lifeSummary: Philippe VI de Valois Roi de France(이)가 1293년 11월 17일 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 폰테인블리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Charles de Valois comte de Valois(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite d'Anjou(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1313년 7월 13일 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 폰테인블리에서 Jeanne de Bourgogne Reine de France(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1350년 8월 22일 프랑스 우레-트-로이르에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-세인트-데니스 세인트-데니스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippe VI de Valois Roi de France nasceu em 17 de novembro de 1293, em Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, França, seu pai, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite d'Anjou, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Bourgogne Reine de France em 13 de julho de 1313, em Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1350, em Eure-et-Loir, França, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, França.

ru.Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Franc: л манс, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippe VI de Valois Roi de France родился 17 ноября 1293 г. в местности фонтеинебло, сине-ет-марн, Франция, его отцу по имени Charles de Valois comte de Valois было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Marguerite d'Anjou, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Bourgogne Reine de France 13 июля 1313 г. в местности фонтеинебло, сине-ет-марн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 22 августа 1350 г. в местности эуре-ет-лоир, Франция в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-денис, сине-сеинт-денис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Franc: Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philippe VI de Valois Roi de France nació el 17 de noviembre de 1293, en Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, su papá, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Marguerite d'Anjou, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Bourgogne Reine de France el 13 de julio de 1313, en Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1350, en Eure-et-Loir, Francia, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.
